summary: Iteration 245 - Notifiche Smart In-App (N1+N2) Testing Complete. Backend APIs (17/17 tests passed) working correctly. Frontend bell icon, badge, and drawer components functional. Fixed navigation bug where 'Vedi tutte le notifiche' was navigating to non-existent /notifiche-smart route.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/notifiche-smart: Returns list with items[] and total, supports status filter (unread/read/archived)
GET /api/notifiche-smart/count: Returns {unread: int} for badge display
POST /api/notifiche-smart/{id}/read: Marks single notification as read, returns {marked: bool}
POST /api/notifiche-smart/read-all: Marks all unread as read, returns {marked: int}
Notification structure includes: notification_id, user_id, notification_type, title, message, severity, status, linked_route, dedupe_key
Valid notification_types: semaforo_peggiorato, nuovo_hard_block, documento_scaduto, emissione_bloccata, gate_pos_peggiorato, pacchetto_incompleto
Valid severities: critica, alta, media, bassa
POST /api/obblighi/sync/{commessa_id}: Triggers check_and_notify_post_sync and check_and_notify_semaforo async tasks
Deduplication: Same dedupe_key with status=unread updates existing notification instead of creating duplicate
Frontend bell icon (data-testid='smart-notif-bell') shows combined badge of smartCount + alertCount
Notification drawer opens from right side with proper animations
Drawer shows empty state 'Nessuna notifica non letta' when no unread notifications
NotifItem component displays severity colors: critica=red border, alta=amber border, media=blue border
Fixed: 'Vedi tutte le notifiche' now navigates to /notifiche (was incorrectly /notifiche-smart)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Bell icon, badge, drawer, navigation all working)

seed_data_creation: Used existing user data with session_token K6fH_AIOSlUNVh8nGj5yAOjYtEyW-Ifsc4X5SFRVQYQ (user_97c773827822). Existing notifications in DB: 2 (semaforo_peggiorato type for commesse NF-2026-000009 and NF-2026-000037).
context_for_next_testing_agent: N1+N2 Notifiche Smart is fully functional. Backend APIs at /api/notifiche-smart/* all working. Deduplication via dedupe_key prevents duplicate notifications. Sync endpoint triggers async notification creation. Frontend bell icon in topbar shows combined count (smartCount + alertCount). Drawer opens from right, shows unread notifications with severity colors. 'Vedi tutte le notifiche' navigates to /notifiche page.

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/notifiche-smart: PASSED - Returns list with items[] and total
api_endpoints_tested.Deduplication test: PASSED - Same commessa sync doesn't create duplicates

frontend_components_tested.Empty state: PASSED - Shows 'Nessuna notifica non letta' when no unread

features_verified.N1 Data Model: Notification schema with all required fields
features_verified.N1 Badge: Bell icon with unread count badge
features_verified.N2 Deduplication: Same dedupe_key updates existing instead of creating new
features_verified.Italian language: All labels in Italian (Notifiche, Segna tutte lette, Vedi tutte le notifiche, etc.)

bug_fixed.issue: 'Vedi tutte le notifiche' link was navigating to /notifiche-smart which doesn't exist
bug_fixed.fix: Changed navigation target from /notifiche-smart to /notifiche in DashboardLayout.js line 495
